title: Mildly Spiced Portuguese Chicken Tagine
description: A hearty and aromatic Portuguese dish featuring chicken cooked in a tagine pot with biryani masala and infused oil, perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Heat the infused oil in the tagine pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the chicken to the pot and cook until it is browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the biryani masala, dried parsley, salt, and black pepper to the pot and stir to combine.
Pour in the chicken broth and lemon juice, and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 25-30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened.
Serve the chicken and sauce hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
